# 1.8 Shared Serializers & Constants

## Classes to Migrate

| Existing Class | Source | Migration Notes |
|---------------|--------|-----------------|
| `Serializers` (ZonedDateTime encoder/decoder) | `gov-apis/common` | Move to `repcheck.shared.models.codecs` |
| `Constants.OutgoingDateTimeFormat` | `gov-apis/common` | Move to `repcheck.shared.models.constants` |

## New Enums

| Enum | Values | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| `BillType` | HR, S, HJRES, SJRES, HCONRES, SCONRES, HRES, SRES, plus 5 additional | Migrate from existing `BillTypes` enum |
| `Chamber` | House, Senate | New |
| `Party` | Democrat, Republican, Independent | Maps to `members.current_party`, `member_party_history.party_abbreviation`, `vote_positions.party_at_vote`. Abbreviations: D, R, I. |
| `VoteCast` | Yea, Nay, Present, NotVoting, Absent | Maps to `vote_positions.position`. Absent = did not attend; NotVoting = present but abstained. |
| `VoteType` | Passage, ConferenceReport, Cloture, VetoOverride, Amendment, Committee, Recommit, Other | Maps to `votes.vote_type` |
| `AmendmentType` | HAMDT, SAMDT, SUAMDT | Maps to `amendments.amendment_type`. SUAMDT = Senate unprinted amendment. |
| `FindingType` | TopicExtraction, BillSummary, PolicyAnalysis, StanceDetection, Pork, Rider, Lobbying, Constitutional, TextVersionDiff, Impact, FiscalEstimate | 11 total: database seed + TextVersionDiff, Impact, FiscalEstimate for LLM analysis. |
| `FormatType` | FormattedText, PDF, FormattedXml | Migrate from existing enum |
| `TextVersionCode` | IH, IS, RH, RS, RFS, RFH, EH, ES, ENR, CPH, CPS | Bill text version legislative stage codes (11 total). |
| `ChangeType` | Added, Removed, Modified, Renumbered | Section-level change types in bill text diffs. |
| `CommitteePosition` | Chairman, RankingMember, ViceChairman, Member | Member's role on committee; carries attribution weight property. |
| `CommitteeSide` | Majority, Minority | Member's party side on committee |
| `CommitteeType` | Standing, Special, Select, Joint, Subcommittee | Type of congressional committee |

## Committee Attribution Weights

`CommitteePosition.weight: Double` multiplies with committee vote weight (0.4) to compute alignment impact:

| Position | Weight | Rationale |
|----------|--------|-----------|
| Chairman | 1.0 | Drives agenda, controls markup |
| Ranking Member | 0.7 | Leads opposition/minority strategy |
| Vice Chairman | 0.6 | Deputy leadership |
| Member | 0.4 | Participated in process |

Example: Chairman's committee changes = `1.0 × 0.4 = 0.40` alignment; Member's = `0.4 × 0.4 = 0.16`.

| Codec | Type | Notes |

| `UuidCodec` | `Codec[UUID]` | Standard UUID string format |
| `VectorCodec` | `Codec[Array[Float]]` | For pgvector embedding fields |

## New Constants

| Object | Contents |
|--------|----------|
| `CongressGovApiPaths` | Base URL + per-entity path templates: `/v3/bill`, `/v3/member`, `/v3/house-vote`, `/v3/amendment`, `/v3/committee` |
| `ChamberDataPaths` | Senate: `senate.gov/legislative/LIS_MEMBER/cvc_member_data.xml` (member + committee), `senate.gov/legislative/LIS/roll_call_votes/` (vote XML). House: `clerk.house.gov/xml/lists/memberdata.xml` (member + committee). |
| `PaginationDefaults` | defaultPageSize: Int, maxPageSize: Int |

## Enum Alias Mapping

Each enum accepts multi-source aliases and maps to canonical value:

| Enum | Source Aliases → Canonical |
|------|---------------------------|
| `Party` | "Democratic", "Democrat", "D" → `Democrat`; "Republican", "R" → `Republican`; "Independent", "I", "ID" → `Independent` |
| `Chamber` | "House", "House of Representatives" → `House`; "Senate" → `Senate` |
| `VoteCast` | "Yea", "Aye", "Yes" → `Yea`; "Nay", "No" → `Nay`; "Present" → `Present`; "Not Voting", "NotVoting" → `NotVoting`; "Absent" → `Absent` |
| `CommitteePosition` | "Chairman", "Chair", "Chairwoman", "Chairperson" → `Chairman`; "Ranking", "Ranking Member" → `RankingMember`; "Vice Chairman", "Vice Chair", "Vice Chairwoman" → `ViceChairman`; "Member" → `Member` |
| `CommitteeSide` | "majority", "Majority", "M" → `Majority`; "minority", "Minority" → `Minority` |
| `TextVersionCode` | Code + full name for all 11 values (e.g., "RH", "Reported in House" → `RH`) |

## Acceptance Criteria

**Functional:**
1. `ZonedDateTime` encoder/decoder round-trips ISO-8601 format (migrated behavior).
2. `LocalDate` encoder/decoder round-trips ISO-8601 (`yyyy-MM-dd`).
3. `UUID` encoder/decoder round-trips standard UUID string format.
4. Every enum: Circe encoder (canonical string), Circe decoder (case-insensitive + alias-aware), `fromString` returning `Either`.
5. `fromString` accepts all known source representations; returns `Left(unrecognized, validValues + aliases)` on mismatch.
6. `BillType` includes all 13 existing values.
7. `VoteType.fromQuestion` classifies known patterns ("On Passage" → `Passage`, "On Cloture" → `Cloture`); returns `Other` for unrecognized.
8. `FindingType` covers 11 values (seed + TextVersionDiff, Impact, FiscalEstimate).
9. `TextVersionCode` covers 11 codes; `fromString` accepts code and full name.
10. `CommitteePosition`, `CommitteeSide`, `CommitteeType` have Circe codecs and `fromString`.
11. `CommitteePosition.weight`: Chairman = 1.0, RankingMember = 0.7, ViceChairman = 0.6, Member = 0.4.
12. `CongressGovApiPaths` templates produce correct URLs when interpolated.
13. `ChamberDataPaths` contains correct Senate and House XML URLs.

**Test Requirements:**
14. Round-trip codec tests: `ZonedDateTime` (timezones, UTC, edge cases), `LocalDate`, `UUID`.
15. Exhaustive enum parsing: all values parse from canonical string; includes all new enums.
16. Unknown enum tests: descriptive `Left` with valid values + aliases.
17. Case-insensitivity: "HOUSE", "house", "House" → `Chamber.House`.
18. **Multi-source alias tests** — one test per alias:
    - `Party`: "Democratic" → Democrat, "D" → Democrat, "Republican" → Republican, "R" → Republican, "Independent" → Independent, "I" → Independent, "ID" → Independent
    - `Chamber`: "House of Representatives" → House, "House" → House, "Senate" → Senate
    - `VoteCast`: "Yea" → Yea, "Aye" → Yea, "Yes" → Yea, "Nay" → Nay, "No" → Nay, "Not Voting" → NotVoting, "Absent" → Absent
    - `CommitteePosition`: "Chairman" → Chairman, "Chair" → Chairman, "Chairwoman" → Chairman, "Chairperson" → Chairman, "Ranking" → RankingMember, "Ranking Member" → RankingMember, "Vice Chairman" → ViceChairman, "Vice Chair" → ViceChairman
    - `CommitteeSide`: "majority" → Majority, "M" → Majority, "minority" → Minority
    - `TextVersionCode`: code + full name for all 11 values
19. `CommitteePosition.weight` test: Chairman = 1.0, RankingMember = 0.7, ViceChairman = 0.6, Member = 0.4.
